name: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Flex Mini
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Flex Mini
short_description: 5-Port managed Gigabit Ethernet switch powered by 802.3af/at PoE or 5V, 1A USB-C power adapter
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Flex Mini (USW-Flex-Mini) is a compact 5-port Layer 2 Gigabit switch designed for simple, efficient network expansion in homes, small offices, and workspaces. Its minimal footprint and clean design make it ideal for desktop placement where space and aesthetics matter. The switch is equipped with five 1 GbE RJ45 ports, allowing multiple wired devices such as computers, printers, IP phones, and access points to be connected at full Gigabit speeds. Built for everyday networking scenarios, the USW-Flex-Mini delivers reliable wired connectivity without the complexity of larger enterprise switches. The switch is designed for stable operation in typical indoor environments, supporting an ambient operating temperature range from –5 to 45°C.

detailed_description.heading: Ultra-Compact Switch
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Flex Mini (USW-Flex-Mini) is a compact 5-port Layer 2 Gigabit switch designed for simple, efficient network expansion in homes, small offices, and workspaces. Its minimal footprint and clean design make it ideal for desktop placement where space and aesthetics matter. The switch is equipped with five 1 GbE RJ45 ports, allowing multiple wired devices such as computers, printers, IP phones, and access points to be connected at full Gigabit speeds. Built for everyday networking scenarios, the USW-Flex-Mini delivers reliable wired connectivity without the complexity of larger enterprise switches. The switch is designed for stable operation in typical indoor environments, supporting an ambient operating temperature range from –5 to 45°C.

detailed_description.heading: Compact and Durable Design
detailed_description.text: Thanks to its compact desktop form factor, the device fits easily on desks, shelves, or in media cabinets. The enclosure and mounting elements are made of durable polycarbonate, providing strength while keeping the unit lightweight at just 150 g. This makes it easy to reposition or integrate into existing setups without additional mounting hardware. Integrated electrostatic discharge protection rated at ±16 kV (air) and ±12 kV (contact) helps protect the device from static-related damage during handling and everyday use. With its simple physical design, silent operation, and UniFi ecosystem compatibility, the USW-Flex-Mini is well suited for users who need dependable wired connectivity in a compact and unobtrusive form. It is an excellent choice for extending Ethernet connectivity at the network edge while maintaining a clean and organized workspace.

detailed_description.heading: Layer 2 Performance
detailed_description.text: Despite its small size, the UniFi Switch Flex Mini delivers solid performance based on a capable Layer 2 switching architecture. The switch offers a switching capacity of 10 Gbps, ensuring smooth internal data handling without congestion when multiple devices communicate simultaneously. With a total non-blocking throughput of 5 Gbps, all ports can operate concurrently at full duplex speeds under typical usage conditions. A forwarding rate of 7 million packets per second enables responsive packet processing, supporting latency-sensitive applications such as VoIP, video streaming, and interactive workloads. The switch supports up to 1,000 VLANs, allowing effective network segmentation for improved security, traffic isolation, and logical network organization. This makes the USW-Flex-Mini suitable not only for simple flat networks but also for more structured environments.

detailed_description.heading: Traffic Management and Security
detailed_description.text: A MAC address table capacity of 2,000 entries ensures stable operation even as the number of connected endpoints grows. To enhance traffic management and network reliability, the switch includes a comprehensive set of Layer 2 features. These include egress rate limiting for bandwidth control, flow control for congestion handling, and storm control to protect against excessive broadcast traffic. Additional controls such as multicast and broadcast rate limiting help maintain predictable performance. Security and diagnostics are supported through port isolation, which restricts direct communication between ports, and port mirroring, which simplifies traffic analysis and troubleshooting. Support for jumbo frames improves efficiency when transferring large data payloads, reducing protocol overhead and CPU load.

detailed_description.heading: Energy-Efficient Design
detailed_description.text: The UniFi Switch Flex Mini is designed for maximum deployment flexibility, offering dual power options to suit different installation scenarios. It can be powered either via PoE or through a USB Type-C connection, with a 5V DC, 1A USB-C adapter included in the package. This allows the switch to be installed in locations where PoE infrastructure is available or powered from a standard electrical outlet. The supported voltage ranges include 4.8–5.2V DC via USB-C and 44–57V via PoE, ensuring compatibility with common power sources. An external AC/DC power supply rated at 5W provides stable power delivery when USB-C is used. The switch is highly energy efficient, with a maximum power consumption of just 2.5W, making it an excellent choice for continuous operation with minimal energy costs.

detailed_description.heading: Low Power and Centralized Management
detailed_description.text: Low power usage also results in minimal heat output, with heat dissipation rated at 6.8 BTU per hour, supporting silent, fanless operation. Management is handled via Ethernet using the UniFi Network application version 5.12.5 or later, enabling centralized monitoring, configuration, and firmware updates alongside other UniFi devices. This ensures a consistent management experience across the UniFi ecosystem. The USW-Flex-Mini is NDAA compliant and certified to CE, FCC, IC, and Anatel standards, confirming its suitability for commercial and regulated deployments. Combined with its efficient power design and unified management, the switch delivers dependable performance in a compact, professional solution.
